name: Pappas' Famous Greek Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup salad dressing (or Hellman's or Best mayonnaise)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the potato salad first by cooking potatoes until soft and cool enough to handle. Peel, cut into bite-sized pieces, and mix with the remaining potato salad ingredients.
2. Save 10 leaves of lettuce for later use; shred the rest finely.
3. Prepare all vegetables as indicated in the recipe.
4. On a large platter, arrange whole lettuce leaves with watercress.
5. Place the potato salad on top of the greens.
6. Alternate tomato wedges and cucumber fingers around the outside of the platter.
7. Scatter avocado slices throughout the salad.
8. Arrange slices of feta cheese, green pepper slices, olives, beets, and green onions over the salad.
9. Top with shrimp, anchovy fillets, and radish roses.
10. Drizzle with white vinegar and blended olive oil, then sprinkle with oregano.
11. Serve immediately with garlic toasted Greek bread.
12. Serves 4.
